footer.aboutDesc: The Prime Minister's Internship Scheme (PMIS) is part of the Prime Minister's package of five schemes and initiatives designed to facilitate employment, skilling, and other opportunities for India's youth. PMIS is aimed at youth currently not in full time employment, providing them with paid internship opportunities in leading companies across India. The objective of this scheme is to enhance the employability of Indian youth. The pilot phase of the scheme is currently underway.
footer.downloadDesc: Click the button below to download the app or scan the QR code with your phone.
